task_description: Brownfield edit: reorder two adjacent tasks in an existing, valid Maestro BPMN by rewiring the sequence flows (BPMN has no positional move — the edit is a pure rewiring), keeping both node payloads and the diagram consistent.

success_criteria_results.description: The edited BPMN file is still present
Tasks reordered by rewiring flows, payloads preserved, file still structurally sound
success_criteria_results.details:
Command: python3 $TASK_DIR/check_move_node.py
Exit code: 0 (expected: 0)
Stdout:
OK: nodes reordered, flows rewired, payloads preserved

Stderr: (empty)

iterations.user_input:
Your working directory is: /work/output/artifacts/skill-bpmn-edit-move-node

Load and follow the uipath-maestro-bpmn skill.

A valid Maestro BPMN file `Onboarding.bpmn` is in the working directory. Its
flow is: "Create Account" (Task_Create) -> "Send Welcome" (Task_Welcome).

Reorder the process so "Send Welcome" runs BEFORE "Create Account": the flow
must become Start -> Send Welcome -> Create Account -> end. Rewire the sequence
flows and keep the diagram edges consistent with the new order.

Make a SURGICAL edit: both tasks' names, uipath:* extension payloads, element
ids, uipath:migrationVersion, and the process variables must round-trip
untouched — only the wiring changes.

Validate the edited file locally before finishing. Do not upload, publish,
deploy, debug, run, or pack anything, and do not pause for approval — make the
edit end to end in one pass.
iterations.agent_output:
[ASSISTANT] Now I have a clear picture of the file. The surgical changes needed:

1. **Sequence flows**: rewire `Flow_SC → Task_Welcome`, `Flow_CW: Welcome→Create`, `Flow_WE: Create→End`
2. **Task incoming/outgoing refs**: swap them on both tasks
3. **Diagram shapes**: swap the x-positions of the two tasks (so `Task_Welcome` sits where `Task_Create` was and vice versa); edge waypoints stay identical since the lane positions are preserved by the swap
[ASSISTANT] Now validate:
[ASSISTANT] The validator's source is on a read-only filesystem. I'll copy it to the working directory where I can install dependencies:
[ASSISTANT] The validator reports **VALID**.

---

Here is a summary of every surgical change made — nothing else was touched:

| What changed | Old value | New value |
|---|---|---|
| `Flow_SC` `targetRef` | `Task_Create` | `Task_Welcome` |
| `Flow_CW` `sourceRef` / `targetRef` | `Task_Create` → `Task_Welcome` | `Task_Welcome` → `Task_Create` |
| `Flow_WE` `sourceRef` | `Task_Welcome` | `Task_Create` |
| `Task_Welcome` `<bpmn:incoming>` / `<bpmn:outgoing>` | `Flow_CW` / `Flow_WE` | `Flow_SC` / `Flow_CW` |
| `Task_Create` `<bpmn:incoming>` / `<bpmn:outgoing>` | `Flow_SC` / `Flow_CW` | `Flow_CW` / `Flow_WE` |
| Diagram shape positions | `Task_Create` at x=250, `Task_Welcome` at x=410 | `Task_Welcome` at x=250, `Task_Create` at x=410 |

**Preserved untouched:** both tasks' `id`, `name`, `uipath:*` extension payloads, `<bpmn:script>` bodies, `uipath:migrationVersion`, `uipath:caseManagement`, process variables (`Var_Email`, `Var_AccountId`), all element IDs (including flow IDs and shape/edge IDs), and all diagram edge waypoint coordinates.
[RESULT - SUCCESS] The validator reports **VALID**.

---

Here is a summary of every surgical change made — nothing else was touched:

| `Flow_WE` `sourceRef` | `Task_Welcome` | `Task_Create` |
| `Task_Welcome` `<bpmn:incoming>` / `<bpmn:outgoing>` | `Flow_CW` / `Flow_WE` | `Flow_SC` / `Flow_CW` |
| `Task_Create` `<bpmn:incoming>` / `<bpmn:outgoing>` | `Flow_SC` / `Flow_CW` | `Flow_CW` / `Flow_WE` |
| Diagram shape positions | `Task_Create` at x=250, `Task_Welcome` at x=410 | `Task_Welcome` at x=250, `Task_Create` at x=410 |

**Preserved untouched:** both tasks' `id`, `name`, `uipath:*` extension payloads, `<bpmn:script>` bodies, `uipath:migrationVersion`, `uipath:caseManagement`, process variables (`Var_Email`, `Var_AccountId`), all element IDs (including flow IDs and shape/edge IDs), and all diagram edge waypoint coordinates.

parameters.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions
    xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
    xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI"
    xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC"
    xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI"
    xmlns:uipath="http://uipath.org/schema/bpmn"
    id="Definitions_Onboarding" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn"
    exporter="UiPath (https://bpmn.uipath.com)" exporterVersion="1.0">
  <bpmn:process id="Process_Onboarding" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:extensionElements>
      <uipath:migrationVersion version="11.5" />
      <uipath:caseManagement version="v1"><![CDATA[{"owner":"people-ops","opaque":"preserve-only-do-not-touch"}]]></uipath:caseManagement>
      <uipath:variables version="v1">
        <uipath:inputOutput id="Var_Email" name="Email" type="string" />
        <uipath:inputOutput id="Var_AccountId" name="AccountId" type="string" />
      </uipath:variables>
    </bpmn:extensionElements>
    <bpmn:startEvent id="Start_1" name="Start"><bpmn:outgoing>Flow_SC</bpmn:outgoing></bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_Create" name="Create Account" scriptFormat="JavaScript">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <uipath:scriptVersion value="v3" />
        <uipath:mapping version="v1">
          <uipath:type value="BPMN.ScriptTask" version="v1" />
          <uipath:input name="args"><![CDATA[{"email":"=vars.Var_Email"}]]></uipath:input>
          <uipath:output name="accountId" type="string" var="Var_AccountId" source="=result.response" />
        </uipath:mapping>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_CW</bpmn:incoming><bpmn:outgoing>Flow_WE</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script><![CDATA[return { response: "acct-" + email };]]></bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_Welcome" name="Send Welcome" scriptFormat="JavaScript">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <uipath:scriptVersion value="v3" />
        <uipath:mapping version="v1">
          <uipath:type value="BPMN.ScriptTask" version="v1" />
          <uipath:input name="args"><![CDATA[{"email":"=vars.Var_Email"}]]></uipath:input>
        </uipath:mapping>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_SC</bpmn:incoming><bpmn:outgoing>Flow_CW</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script><![CDATA[return { response: "welcome sent" };]]></bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:endEvent id="End_1" name="Done"><bpmn:incoming>Flow_WE</bpmn:incoming></bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_SC" sourceRef="Start_1" targetRef="Task_Welcome" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_CW" sourceRef="Task_Welcome" targetRef="Task_Create" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_WE" sourceRef="Task_Create" targetRef="End_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="Diagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="Plane_1" bpmnElement="Process_Onboarding">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_Start_1" bpmnElement="Start_1"><dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="36" height="36" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_Task_Welcome" bpmnElement="Task_Welcome"><dc:Bounds x="250" y="78" width="100" height="80" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_Task_Create" bpmnElement="Task_Create"><dc:Bounds x="410" y="78" width="100" height="80" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_End_1" bpmnElement="End_1"><dc:Bounds x="570" y="100" width="36" height="36" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="E_Flow_SC" bpmnElement="Flow_SC"><di:waypoint x="196" y="118" /><di:waypoint x="250" y="118" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="E_Flow_CW" bpmnElement="Flow_CW"><di:waypoint x="350" y="118" /><di:waypoint x="410" y="118" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="E_Flow_WE" bpmnElement="Flow_WE"><di:waypoint x="510" y="118" /><di:waypoint x="570" y="118" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>

content_blocks.thinking: The user wants me to load the uipath-maestro-bpmn skill and then edit a BPMN file to reorder tasks. Let me first load the skill, then read the file and make the necessary changes.
Let me start by reading the existing `Onboarding.bpmn` file to understand its current structure, then make the surgical edit to reorder the tasks.

Now I understand the current structure:
- Start_1 -> Flow_SC -> Task_Create -> Flow_CW -> Task_Welcome -> Flow_WE -> End_1

The new order should be:
- Start_1 -> Task_Welcome -> Task_Create -> End_1

The surgical changes needed:
1. **Sequence flows**: 
   - Flow_SC: sourceRef="Start_1" targetRef should change from "Task_Create" to "Task_Welcome"
   - Flow_CW: sourceRef should change from "Task_Create" to "Task_Welcome", targetRef should change from "Task_Welcome" to "Task_Create"
   - Flow_WE: sourceRef should change from "Task_Welcome" to "Task_Create" (targetRef "End_1" stays the same)

2. **Task incoming/outgoing references**:
   - Task_Create needs its incoming flow updated from Flow_SC to Flow_CW, and outgoing from Flow_CW to Flow_WE
   - Task_Welcome needs its incoming flow updated from Flow_CW to Flow_SC, and outgoing from Flow_WE to Flow_CW

3. **Diagram waypoints** need adjustment so the visual edges align with the new flow connections, particularly for Flow_SC connecting Start_1 to Task_Welcome.

4. **Layout positioning**: I'm reviewing the current coordinates for each element and planning the new arrangement where the sequence flows Start → Task_Welcome → Task_Create → End, which will require repositioning the task boxes and recalculating the waypoints for each connecting edge. _Welcome: x=250, y=78, w=100, h=80 (center 300, 118) — moved to where Task_Create was
- Task_Create: x=410, y=78, w=100, h=80 (center 460, 118) — moved to where Task_Welcome was
- End_1: x=570, y=100, w=36, h=36 (center 588, 118)

Edges:
- E_Flow_SC (Flow_SC: Start_1 → Task_Welcome): waypoint from 196,118 to 250,118
- E_Flow_CW (Flow_CW: Task_Welcome → Task_Create): waypoint from 350,118 to 410,118
- E_Flow_WE (Flow_WE: Task_Create → End_1): waypoint from 510,118 to 570,118

The waypoints stay the same, but now they connect the swapped elements. I need to update the BPMN file to reflect these changes: Flow_SC now targets Task_Welcome instead of Task_Create, Flow_CW swaps its source and target references, and Flow_WE now originates from Task_Create. I'll also update the incoming and outgoing flow references for both tasks.

In the diagram, I'm swapping the x-coordinates of the two task shapes so Task_Welcome moves to position 250 and Task_Create moves to 410, while keeping all the edge waypoints unchanged.

Writing the updated BPMN file...

resolved.initial_prompt:
Load and follow the uipath-maestro-bpmn skill.

A valid Maestro BPMN file `Onboarding.bpmn` is in the working directory. Its
flow is: "Create Account" (Task_Create) -> "Send Welcome" (Task_Welcome).

Reorder the process so "Send Welcome" runs BEFORE "Create Account": the flow
must become Start -> Send Welcome -> Create Account -> end. Rewire the sequence
flows and keep the diagram edges consistent with the new order.

Make a SURGICAL edit: both tasks' names, uipath:* extension payloads, element
ids, uipath:migrationVersion, and the process variables must round-trip
untouched — only the wiring changes.

Validate the edited file locally before finishing. Do not upload, publish,
deploy, debug, run, or pack anything, and do not pause for approval — make the
edit end to end in one pass.

task_config.source_yaml:
task_id: skill-bpmn-edit-move-node
description: >
  Brownfield edit: reorder two adjacent tasks in an existing, valid Maestro BPMN
  by rewiring the sequence flows (BPMN has no positional move — the edit is a
  pure rewiring), keeping both node payloads and the diagram consistent.
tags: [uipath-maestro-bpmn, integration, "mode:build", "lifecycle:generate", "shape:multi-node"]

run_limits:
  expected_turns: 16
  max_turns: 70

sandbox:
  template_sources:
    - type: template_dir
      path: ../../../../../skills/uipath-maestro-bpmn
    - type: template_dir
      path: fixture

initial_prompt: |
  Load and follow the uipath-maestro-bpmn skill.

  A valid Maestro BPMN file `Onboarding.bpmn` is in the working directory. Its
  flow is: "Create Account" (Task_Create) -> "Send Welcome" (Task_Welcome).

  Reorder the process so "Send Welcome" runs BEFORE "Create Account": the flow
  must become Start -> Send Welcome -> Create Account -> end. Rewire the sequence
  flows and keep the diagram edges consistent with the new order.

  Make a SURGICAL edit: both tasks' names, uipath:* extension payloads, element
  ids, uipath:migrationVersion, and the process variables must round-trip
  untouched — only the wiring changes.

  Validate the edited file locally before finishing. Do not upload, publish,
  deploy, debug, run, or pack anything, and do not pause for approval — make the
  edit end to end in one pass.

success_criteria:
  - type: file_exists
    description: "The edited BPMN file is still present"
    path: "Onboarding.bpmn"
    weight: 1.0
    pass_threshold: 1.0

  - type: file_contains
    description: "Preserve-only payload round-tripped untouched"
    path: "Onboarding.bpmn"
    includes:
      - "preserve-only-do-not-touch"
      - 'uipath:migrationVersion'
    weight: 1.0
    pass_threshold: 1.0

  - type: run_command
    description: "Tasks reordered by rewiring flows, payloads preserved, file still structurally sound"
    command: "python3 $TASK_DIR/check_move_node.py"
    timeout: 30
    expected_exit_code: 0
    weight: 4.0
    pass_threshold: 1.0

agent.system_prompt.value: You are a coding agent. Do not access files in sibling runs/* directories. Everywhere else is permitted.

parameters.command: cd /home/azureuser/projects/skills/skills/uipath-maestro-bpmn/validator && npm install --silent 2>&1 | tail -3 && node validate-bpmn.mjs /work/output/artifacts/skill-bpmn-edit-move-node/Onboarding.bpmn

parameters.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions
    xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
    xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI"
    xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC"
    xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI"
    xmlns:uipath="http://uipath.org/schema/bpmn"
    id="Definitions_Onboarding" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn"
    exporter="UiPath (https://bpmn.uipath.com)" exporterVersion="1.0">
  <bpmn:process id="Process_Onboarding" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:extensionElements>
      <uipath:migrationVersion version="11.5" />
      <uipath:caseManagement version="v1"><![CDATA[{"owner":"people-ops","opaque":"preserve-only-do-not-touch"}]]></uipath:caseManagement>
      <uipath:variables version="v1">
        <uipath:inputOutput id="Var_Email" name="Email" type="string" />
        <uipath:inputOutput id="Var_AccountId" name="AccountId" type="string" />
      </uipath:variables>
    </bpmn:extensionElements>
    <bpmn:startEvent id="Start_1" name="Start"><bpmn:outgoing>Flow_SC</bpmn:outgoing></bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_Create" name="Create Account" scriptFormat="JavaScript">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <uipath:scriptVersion value="v3" />
        <uipath:mapping version="v1">
          <uipath:type value="BPMN.ScriptTask" version="v1" />
          <uipath:input name="args"><![CDATA[{"email":"=vars.Var_Email"}]]></uipath:input>
          <uipath:output name="accountId" type="string" var="Var_AccountId" source="=result.response" />
        </uipath:mapping>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_CW</bpmn:incoming><bpmn:outgoing>Flow_WE</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script><![CDATA[return { response: "acct-" + email };]]></bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_Welcome" name="Send Welcome" scriptFormat="JavaScript">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <uipath:scriptVersion value="v3" />
        <uipath:mapping version="v1">
          <uipath:type value="BPMN.ScriptTask" version="v1" />
          <uipath:input name="args"><![CDATA[{"email":"=vars.Var_Email"}]]></uipath:input>
        </uipath:mapping>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_SC</bpmn:incoming><bpmn:outgoing>Flow_CW</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script><![CDATA[return { response: "welcome sent" };]]></bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:endEvent id="End_1" name="Done"><bpmn:incoming>Flow_WE</bpmn:incoming></bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_SC" sourceRef="Start_1" targetRef="Task_Welcome" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_CW" sourceRef="Task_Welcome" targetRef="Task_Create" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_WE" sourceRef="Task_Create" targetRef="End_1" />
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="Diagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="Plane_1" bpmnElement="Process_Onboarding">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_Start_1" bpmnElement="Start_1"><dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="36" height="36" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_Task_Welcome" bpmnElement="Task_Welcome"><dc:Bounds x="250" y="78" width="100" height="80" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_Task_Create" bpmnElement="Task_Create"><dc:Bounds x="410" y="78" width="100" height="80" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="S_End_1" bpmnElement="End_1"><dc:Bounds x="570" y="100" width="36" height="36" /></bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="E_Flow_SC" bpmnElement="Flow_SC"><di:waypoint x="196" y="118" /><di:waypoint x="250" y="118" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="E_Flow_CW" bpmnElement="Flow_CW"><di:waypoint x="350" y="118" /><di:waypoint x="410" y="118" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="E_Flow_WE" bpmnElement="Flow_WE"><di:waypoint x="510" y="118" /><di:waypoint x="570" y="118" /></bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn:definitions>
